articles.title: Bond bull market may pause but is far from over: Expert
articles.summary: The benchmark 10-year government-security yield remained stuck in 8-7.5 percent range through all of 2015 and half of 2016, moving lower to sub-7 percent only when the RBI promised in April to reduce the system's liquidity deficit. The yield may now fall more.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Scope for meaningful rate cuts going ahead: Neelkanth Mishra
articles.summary: Credit Suisse' Neelkanth Mishra expects repo rate to fall to a decade low in the coming quarters. He says that beginning December the market may see a robust and widespread pick-up which may boost indices.

articles.summary: Diksha Polymers shares were listed at ₹114.50 apiece on the BSE SME, a premium of 2.23% to the issue price of ₹112.00 per share. The SME stock touched a high of ₹120.20 apiece, rising 5% from listing price and 7.32% from its issue price.

articles.summary: Clay Craft India IPO listing: Clay Craft India shares listed at ₹211 on the NSE SME against their issue price of ₹203. The SME stock hit its upper price band of ₹221.55, jumping over 9% with respect to the issue price.

articles.summary: CLSA assigned an ‘Outperform’ rating on Vedanta Aluminium Metal shares, with a target price of ₹540 apiece, based on 6x FY28CL EV/Ebitda. The target price implies an upside potential of 18% from Tuesday’s closing price.

articles.summary: Knack Packaging's IPO ranges from ₹161 to ₹170, open for subscription from July 1-3. The lot size is 88 shares, with a distribution among QIBs, NIIs, and retail investors. Listing on BSE and NSE anticipated on July 8.

articles.title: Rupee falls 16 paise to open at 94.90 against US dollar
articles.summary: The rupee fell 16 paise to 94.90 against the US dollar as expectations of a Federal Reserve rate hike rise. Despite easing crude oil prices, the currency struggles, influenced by importer demand and the Fed's hawkish stance, with potential upside anticipated if it surpasses 95.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Gold rate crashes over 1% on MCX as US dollar index hits over 1-year high; experts highlight key levels to watch
articles.summary: Gold rate crashed by over 1% on MCX as the US dollar index jumped to a 1-year high. MCX gold August futures were 1.21% down at ₹1,44,759 per 10 grams, while MCX silver July futures were 0.71% down at ₹2,24,227 per kg around 9:10 am.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: BSE to Marico - Jay Thakkar suggests 3 stocks to buy or sell for short-term in F&O segment

articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Why the NSE IPO may not create wealth like BSE’s did
articles.summary: The NSE IPO arrives after a decade-long boom in Indian markets that enriched existing shareholders. While the exchange remains dominant and highly profitable, matching the stellar returns delivered by BSE since 2017 may prove far tougher.
articles.label: BEARISH
